import sqlite3


def find_user_by_name(conn: sqlite3.Connection, name: str) -> list[dict]:
    query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '{name}'"
    cursor = conn.execute(query)
    return cursor.fetchall()


def get_orders_by_status(conn: sqlite3.Connection, status: str) -> list[dict]:
    query = "SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = '%s'" % status
    cursor = conn.execute(query)
    return cursor.fetchall()


def search_products(conn: sqlite3.Connection, keyword: str) -> list[dict]:
    query = f"SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%{keyword}%'"
    cursor = conn.execute(query)
    return cursor.fetchall()


def delete_expired_sessions(conn: sqlite3.Connection, table: str, days: int) -> None:
    query = f"DELETE FROM {table} WHERE created_at < datetime('now', '-{days} days')"
    conn.execute(query)
    conn.commit()
